word: H5402 - נֶשֶׁק - nesheq - neh'-shek - Armed men

sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁק נשׁק

Transliteration: nesheq nêsheq

Phonetic: neh'-shek

BDB Definition:

  1. equipment, weapons, armoury
    1. equipment, weapons
    2. armoury

Origin: from H5401

TWOT entry: 1436a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
